result:
Here's the omnichannel integration sync architecture in this codebase:

---

## Core Model Classes (business logic)

| File | Class/Role |
|------|------------|
| `app/EasyEcom.php` | **EasyEcom** — EasyEcom integration logic (orders, inventory, cancellations) |
| `app/Unicommerce.php` | **Unicommerce** — Unicommerce integration (~22K+ lines; orders, shipping, delivery, inventory) |
| `app/OnlineOrder.php` | **OnlineOrder** — Generic online/omnichannel order processing |
| `app/Shopify.php` | **Shopify** — Shopify integration model |
| `app/Urbanpiper.php` | **Urbanpiper** — UrbanPiper aggregator integration |
| `app/Order.php` | **Order** — Central order model; dispatches to EasyEcom/Unicommerce sync jobs |

## Controllers

| File | Class |
|------|-------|
| `app/Http/Controllers/v2/EasyEcomController.php` | **EasyEcomController** — `createEasyEcomOrder`, `confirmEasyEcomOrder`, `cancelEasyEcomOrder`, `getEasyEcomOrder` |
| `app/Http/Controllers/v2/UnicommerceController.php` | **UnicommerceController** — `receiveUnicommerceOrderDeliveryStatus`, `unicommerceMissingItemsPush` |
| `app/Http/Controllers/unicommerceApiController.php` | **unicommerceApiController** — `fetchUnicommerceCancellationOrder` |
| `app/Http/Controllers/EasyEcomApiController.php` | **EasyEcomApiController** — `getEasyEcomOrderTrackerDetailsApp`, `fetchEasyEcomCancellationOrder` |
| `app/Http/Controllers/OnlineOrderController.php` | **OnlineOrderController** — online order CRUD |
| `app/Http/Controllers/ShopifyController.php` | **ShopifyController** |
| `app/Http/Controllers/UrbanpiperController.php` | **UrbanpiperController** |
| `app/Http/Controllers/InventoryController.php` | Inventory sync trigger (lines ~685, ~1014) — checks `syncInventoryToEasyEcomOmniChannel` flag |
| `app/Http/Controllers/InventoryWeb.php` | Same inventory sync trigger (line ~412) |
| `app/Http/Controllers/v2/InventoryWeb.php` | v2 inventory sync (lines ~1031, ~1349) |

## Background Jobs (async sync)

**Unicommerce:**
| File | Job |
|------|-----|
| `app/Jobs/UnicommerceCreateSaleOrderJob.php` | Create sale order in Unicommerce |
| `app/Jobs/UnicommercePISaleOrderJob.php` | Push PI-based sale order |
| `app/Jobs/UnicommerceCancelSaleOrderJob.php` | Cancel sale order |
| `app/Jobs/UnicommerceRefundSaleOrderJob.php` | Refund sale order |
| `app/Jobs/UnicommerceInventoryUpdateJob.php` | Push inventory updates |
| `app/Jobs/UnicommerceCreateInvoiceJob.php` | Create invoice |
| `app/Jobs/UnicommerceAutoAcceptOrderJob.php` | Auto-accept incoming orders |
| `app/Jobs/UnicommerceAutoOrderDispatchJob.php` | Auto-dispatch orders |
| `app/Jobs/UnicommerceAllocateShippingProviderJob.php` | Allocate shipping |
| `app/Jobs/UnicommerceUpdateShippingPackageJob.php` | Update shipping package |
| `app/Jobs/UnicommerceManifestJob.php` | Create manifest |
| `app/Jobs/UnicommerceCreateGatePassJob.php` | Create gate pass |
| `app/Jobs/UnicommerceCompleteGatePassJob.php` | Complete gate pass |

**EasyEcom:**
| File | Job |
|------|-----|
| `app/Jobs/EasyEcomSaleOrderJob.php` | Create sale order in EasyEcom |
| `app/Jobs/EasyEcomPISaleOrderJob.php` | Push PI sale order |
| `app/Jobs/EasyEcomOrderConfirmJob.php` | Confirm order |
| `app/Jobs/EasyEcomOrderDispatchJob.php` | Dispatch order |
| `app/Jobs/EasyEcomOrderInvoiceJob.php` | Create invoice |
| `app/Jobs/EasyEcomInventoryUpdateJob.php` | Push inventory updates |

**Generic:**
| File | Job |
|------|-----|
| `app/Jobs/OnlineOrdersJob.php` | Process online/omnichannel orders |

## Key Sync Functions

- **`EasyEcom::createEasyEcomOrder()`** / `createEasyEcomOrderQB()` — push orders to EasyEcom
- **`EasyEcom::confirmEasyEcomOrder()`** / `cancelEasyEcomOrder()` — lifecycle sync
- **`EasyEcom::getEasyEcomOrder()`** — pull orders from EasyEcom
- **`Unicommerce::createUnicommerceSalesOrder()`** — push orders to Unicommerce
- **`Unicommerce::receiveUnicommerceOrderDeliveryStatus()`** — receive delivery callbacks
- **`Unicommerce::unicommerceMissingItemsPush()`** — reconcile missing items

## Schema / Config

- `cloud_schema/globals.sql` — `syncInventoryToEasyEcomOmniChannel` flag (line ~6612) in the stores config table
- `cloud_schema/chain.sql` / `store.sql` — PINumber fields, integration config columns

## Middleware

- `app/Http/Middleware/UrbanpiperAccess.php` — auth middleware for UrbanPiper callbacks

## Inventory Sync Flow

The inventory controllers (`InventoryController`, `InventoryWeb`, `v2/InventoryWeb`) check the `syncInventoryToEasyEcomOmniChannel` store-level flag. When enabled and a stock transaction occurs (excluding STOCK_HOLD/STOCK_RELEASE), they dispatch `EasyEcomInventoryUpdateJob` or `UnicommerceInventoryUpdateJob` to push updated quantities to the respective channel.
